intake_questions.text: Which cloud providers are in use (AWS, Azure, GCP, other)?
Is there a Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) tool deployed?
Has a cloud security review or penetration test been conducted in the last 12 months?
Are cloud infrastructure deployments managed via Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC)?
Are cloud environments subject to regulatory data residency requirements?

scope_template.prompt: Identify which workloads, accounts, and cloud regions are in scope
List cloud accounts, subscriptions, and projects covered by this assessment
Document cloud accounts, workloads, or services explicitly out of scope

requirements.text: Cloud IAM must enforce least-privilege, MFA for all human identities, no long-lived access keys, and periodic access reviews for all cloud accounts in scope.
requirements.evidence_expectation: IAM policy configuration; MFA enrollment report; access key audit; access review records; service account inventory

requirements.text: Cloud network controls must include VPC segmentation, restrictive security group/firewall rules, no public exposure of management interfaces, and private endpoints for data services.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Network architecture diagram; security group/firewall rule export; public IP inventory; private endpoint configuration

requirements.text: All data at rest in cloud storage and databases must be encrypted with customer-managed or platform-managed keys; data in transit must use TLS 1.2+.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Encryption configuration evidence; KMS/key management setup; S3/Blob/GCS encryption audit; TLS configuration verification

requirements.text: Comprehensive logging must be enabled across all cloud accounts covering API activity, network flows, authentication events, and data access, with logs centralised and retained per policy.
requirements.evidence_expectation: CloudTrail/Activity Log/Cloud Audit log configuration; log centralisation evidence; retention policy; SIEM integration evidence

requirements.text: A cloud security posture management process must continuously monitor for misconfigurations with findings prioritised and tracked to remediation.
requirements.evidence_expectation: CSPM tool configuration and coverage; open finding report; remediation SLA evidence; benchmark compliance score

evidence_requests.title: Cloud IAM Configuration Evidence
evidence_requests.description: IAM policy export, MFA enrollment report, access key audit, service account inventory, and access review records

evidence_requests.title: Cloud Network Security Configuration
evidence_requests.description: Network architecture diagram, security group/firewall rule export, public IP inventory, and private endpoint evidence

evidence_requests.title: Cloud Data Encryption Evidence
evidence_requests.description: Encryption configuration for storage, databases, and data in transit; KMS configuration; TLS verification

evidence_requests.title: Cloud Logging and Monitoring Configuration
evidence_requests.description: Logging configuration across all accounts, log retention policy, centralisation setup, and SIEM integration evidence

evidence_requests.title: CSPM Report and Remediation Evidence
evidence_requests.description: CSPM tool coverage report, open finding list with severity, and remediation tracking evidence

task_templates.title: Review cloud IAM configuration against least-privilege principles
Assess cloud network segmentation and public exposure
Verify cloud encryption at rest and in transit coverage
Evaluate cloud logging completeness and centralisation
Review CSPM findings and remediation tracking
Map cloud environment against CIS Cloud Benchmarks
Assess IaC pipeline security controls and secret management

severity_model.critical: Public exposure of sensitive data or admin interface; no encryption; critical misconfiguration exploitable immediately
severity_model.high: Significant misconfiguration enabling lateral movement or data access; MFA absent for privileged users
severity_model.medium: Partial security control failure; logging gaps; non-critical misconfigurations requiring remediation
severity_model.low: Minor configuration improvement; best-practice deviation with low exploitability
severity_model.informational: Hardening recommendation with no direct exploitable risk

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Cloud IAM Remediation Workshop
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Walk through IAM findings; prioritise least-privilege fixes; design service account and access key rotation process

advisory_clinic_templates.title: CSPM Benchmark Tuning Session
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Review CSPM benchmark configuration; suppress accepted risks; prioritise critical findings for sprint remediation

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Cloud Data Classification and Encryption Advisory
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Map sensitive data flows in cloud; advise on encryption key management strategy per data classification
